# drawableMultisample

**Instance Property**

The format of the multisampling buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
var drawableMultisample: GLKViewDrawableMultisample { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKViewDrawableMultisample/multisampleNone].

After your application changes the value of this property, the view recreates its framebuffer object the next time the view is drawn.

## Configuring the Framebuffer Object

- **drawableColorFormat**: The format of the color renderbuffer.
- **drawableDepthFormat**: The format of the depth renderbuffer
- **drawableStencilFormat**: The format of the stencil renderbuffer.
